specs.title: cp-000: Error message format Something went wrong errmessage Please try again
cp-001: Fallback assistant message when API returns no summary Changes applied
cp-002: Input textarea rows1 no auto-resize unlike Slides agent which auto-resizes
cp-003: Input aria-labelSend message on send button
cp-004: Empty state prompt text Ask the AI to modify your entire deck or pick a quick ac
cp-005: Input focused on mount via useEffect with inputRefcurrentfocus
cp-006: Dropdown has AI Actions header 10px uppercase tracking-wider ink-muted above the
cp-007: Each action constructs a slide-specific prompt via buildMessageslideId with exac
cp-008: Sparkle menu errors are silently swallowed catch block with no user-facing error
cp-009: Loading overlay shows AI is working text alongside spinner not just spinner
cp-010: Dropdown has rolemenu each action button has rolemenuitem
cp-011: Trigger button has aria-labelAI card actions and aria-expandedopen
cp-012: Trigger button uses Sparkle ImageSquare belongs to CardBackgroundButton
cp-013: Exactly 12 preset color hex values ffffff f8fafc f1f5f9 e2e8f0 1e293b 0f172a fef
cp-014: Theme colors primary background surface text are prepended to presets and dedupl
cp-015: Custom color uses a ColorPicker component not a raw color input
cp-016: Right image position icon is Columns with style transform scaleX-1 to mirror it
cp-017: Overlay type controls only show when imageUrl is set AND imagePosition none
cp-018: Overlay intensity and color controls only show when overlayType none
cp-019: Overlay intensity defaults to 50 shown as 50
cp-020: Overlay color defaults to 000000
cp-021: Reset button text Reset to default clears cardBackground to undefined
cp-022: Picker width is w-72 288px
cp-023: CardBackgroundButton closes on Escape keypress
cp-024: CardBackgroundButton trigger has aria-labelCard background settings and aria-exp
cp-025: Trigger icon is ImageSquare not just Image icon
cp-026: Existing subtitles are editable in active state via EditableTextBlock with style
cp-027: Non-active cards show Untitled Card when title is empty
cp-028: Empty state active card 0 content blocks italic muted text Click here to start t
cp-029: Text block inline editing supports fontFamily fontSize and color properties from
cp-030: Bullets block editing passes ordered flag to toggle orderedunordered lists
cp-031: Insert buttons between cards show Add card text label alongside the Plus icon no
cp-032: Active card border is border-brand ring-1 ring-brand30 ring-1 not ring-2 as docu
cp-033: Card accent bar is h-1 4px not 1px as stated in original doc
cp-034: Side images leftright take w-25 of card width with min-h-200px
